title: The Night Prayer: A Complete Guide to Praying Tahajjud
excerpt: Tahajjud is the secret of the righteous and the key to answered prayers. Discover how to perform it, when to wake up, and the profound benefits it brings.
author: QuranBookk
content:
While the five daily prayers are an obligation, the Tahajjud (Night Prayer) is a private, voluntary invitation from the Creator. It is performed in the quiet hours of the night when the rest of the world is asleep.

## The Time of Divine Descent

The power of Tahajjud is tied to a beautiful theological reality described by the Prophet ﷺ.

<HadithBlock
  text="Our Lord descends to the lowest heaven in the last third of every night, and He says: 'Who is calling upon Me that I may answer him? Who is asking from Me that I may give him? Who is seeking My forgiveness that I may forgive him?'"
  narrator="Abu Huraira"
  source="Sahih Al-Bukhari"
/>

## Step-by-Step Guide to Tahajjud

### 1. The Timing
Tahajjud can be prayed any time after Isha and before Fajr, but the most blessed time is the last third of the night. (You can calculate this by dividing the time between Maghrib and Fajr into three equal parts).

### 2. The Format
It is prayed in units of two (rak'ahs). You can pray as few as two, or as many as eight. It is highly recommended to recite beautifully and clearly. If you are [memorizing the Quran](/blog/memorizing-quran-hifz-guide), Tahajjud is the ultimate testing ground for your memory.

### 3. Witr
If you have not prayed Witr after Isha, you conclude your Tahajjud session with the Witr prayer.

## What to Recite
If you haven't memorized much, that is completely fine. Recite [Surah Al-Fatiha](/quran/surahs/english_saheeh/1?verse-number=1) and whatever short surahs you know. The goal is not quantity, but the sincerity of your connection. If you want to learn new Duas to recite during sujud, our [Islam AI](/ask-islam-ai) can generate specific prophetic supplications tailored to your exact needs.
